# devmin.ca

devmin.ca is the personal site for Shanmugharaj Kumaragurubaran, also known as Shan.
He is a Toronto-based senior frontend engineer with deep frontend architecture experience across fintech, retail, logistics, developer tooling, open source PaaS, and self-hosted infrastructure.
He is actively seeking senior frontend engineering, frontend architecture, and platform tooling roles in Toronto or remote teams.
He is building Rivet, an open source self-hosted PaaS for deploying Dockerfile apps and public images on a single VPS.

## Primary Links

- [Website](https://devmin.ca/)
- [Resume](https://devmin.ca/Shanmugharaj_Resume.pdf)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/devmin8)
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/shanmugharaj)
- [Sitemap](https://devmin.ca/sitemap.xml)

## Usage Notes

Public website content may be indexed for search and retrieval.
